title: MadGraph5_aMC@NLO
description: Run MadGraph5_aMC@NLO on Runpod Serverless and upload output to S3-compatible storage.

input.name: S3 Endpoint URL
input.description: Endpoint URL of your S3-compatible storage (e.g. Cloudflare R2, AWS S3)

input.name: S3 Access Key ID
input.description: Access key ID for your S3-compatible storage

input.name: S3 Secret Access Key
input.description: Secret access key for your S3-compatible storage

input.name: S3 Bucket
input.description: Name of the S3 bucket where simulation output will be uploaded
